untranslatable_reason: Signal requires options-specific metrics (Implied Volatility, options premium decay, straddle position mechanics) which are not available in the equity price/technical indicator set. Cannot map: (1) IV vs HV comparison with specific threshold, (2) expected move magnitude in standard deviations, (3) time-to-expiration constraints, (4) options entry/exit triggers based on profit percentages from premium paid. The underlying signal is a multi-leg options strategy that cannot be expressed using only OHLCV and technical indicators.
translation_notes: This is a classical options volatility trading signal from Natenberg. The core logic (sell premium when IV < HV, expect large moves) can be approximated with hvol_20 and atr_14, but the straddle-specific mechanics (simultaneous call+put sale, theta decay management, strike selection) require options Greeks not in the allowed indicator set. Recommend implementing this signal in a dedicated options backtester with IV term structure and Greeks.
